publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-12-13 18:04:24 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes papers documenting Sid Saltzman's work.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Emeritus professor in City and Regional Planning, Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, publications, research material on regional modeling, regional science, economic development and public policy analysis in the United States and abroad, and course material on quantitative and modeling, statistics, econometrics, input-output and social accounting matrix models, regional science and quantitative public policy analysis.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Sid Saltzman papers, #15-2-3808. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Economic development.
Quantitative research.
City planning.
Regional planning.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. College of Architecture, Art, and Planning
